  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

4RD CMF1 5.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 753
Recv ID: 773
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 23
Func Name: 4WS

    "supplier": "A32",

  {
    "dtc": 22657,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Abnormal system wake up"

    "name": "maximum Current overshoot (failure mode)"

  },
  {

    "dtctype": 2,

  },

    "name": "Absolute Sensor Data (wires or sensor or acquisition)"

  {

    "name": "Low Temperature Strategy Activated"
  },
  {

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ECU internal relay stuck close or phase wire open (2 or 3 wires)"
